reason: This tweet expresses frustration about Jazan (a Saudi city) being used as a place to send incompetent people. It does not contain ISIS-related content, extremist ideology, or calls to violence.
taxonomy_labels: Social Issues and Activism -> Legal and Justice
original_post: الأعظم من هذا شعرت وكأن جازان منفى لكل من هو فاشل سواء طبيا او عسكريا ً والآن لكل كذاب وضال
